ogTitle: White Gum Valley vs White Peak: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in White Gum Valley and White Peak.
heading: White Gum Valley vs White Peak — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between White Gum Valley, Western Australia and White Peak, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: White Peak has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to White Gum Valley (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is White Gum Valley or White Peak safer from flooding?
faq.answer: White Gum Valley has a flood risk score of 44/100, while White Peak scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: White Gum Valley scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. White Peak scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in White Gum Valley or White Peak?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. White Peak has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
